summary: Phase 2 Batch A regression of School Management System: Salary, Accounts, Homework, Promote, PDF exports. Backend pytest 22/22 PASS in 4.5s (TestSalary 6, TestAccounts 3, TestTransactions 4, TestHomework 4, TestPromote 2, TestPDF 3). Frontend Playwright e2e PASS: admin login → sidebar shows nav-salary/nav-accounts/nav-homework → /salary renders 3 KPI cards + 10 seeded slip rows + Generate button + Mark-paid dialog → /accounts renders 3 KPI cards + 3 tabs + 8 seeded accounts (chart tab) + Add income/expense dialogs → /homework renders 3 seeded cards + class filter + Assign dialog → /students Promote dialog opens with from/to selects + 20 admission-letter PDF icons → /fees 20 invoice PDF download icons. Confirmed paying a salary slip auto-creates an EXP-SAL expense transaction (txn count +1 after pay, type=expense, amount=net_amount, reference=slip_id). PDF endpoints return application/pdf bytes starting with %PDF.

issues: Radix Dialog missing Description / aria-describedby — minor a11y warning, non-blocking. Add <DialogDescription> inside DialogContent or set aria-describedby={undefined}.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py now 1562 lines — already flagged in iteration_1. Strongly recommend splitting into routers/ per feature (salary.py, accounts.py, homework.py, pdfs.py) before adding Batch B/C.
PUT /api/accounts/{account_id} does not validate type value (only POST does). Sending type='bogus' on PUT would silently persist an invalid type. Add the same type-whitelist check used in POST.
POST /api/salary/slips/bulk-generate?month=&year= has no range validation on month (1..12) or year — passing month=99 succeeds and produces nonsensical slips.
POST /api/salary/slips/{id}/pay does not check current status — paying an already-paid slip will create a duplicate EXP-SAL expense transaction. Add `if slip['status']=='paid': raise 400`.

POST /api/students/promote with student_ids=None silently moves ALL students of from_class. UI should confirm or pass explicit IDs; backend could log how many moved (return {moved: n}) for traceability.
DELETE /api/homework allows any teacher to delete any homework (not only their own). Consider scoping to created_by==user.id for teachers.
PDF endpoints (slip.pdf, admission-letter.pdf) are not rate-limited and load full institute+student records each call — acceptable for now but consider streaming/cache if used heavily.
Several Radix DialogContent instances missing aria-describedby — minor a11y.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds chart of accounts, sample transactions, salary slips for current month, and 3 homework rows. Test run created TEST-prefixed account + a transient salary 2099-07 bulk slip + 2099-03-15 cash txn; salary-pay flipped one previously-pending July 2026 slip to paid (this state persists — main agent may want to reseed if regression coverage repeats). Promote test moved-and-reverted one student.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_phase2.py and /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py for full regression. Salary pay endpoint is NOT idempotent — re-running test_pay_creates_expense_txn will keep creating new EXP-SAL transactions (one per pending slip available). Bulk-generate uses query params (?month=&year=), not JSON body. /api/accounts/statement supports optional account_id. PDF endpoints return raw bytes (use r.content[:4]==b'%PDF').
rca of the issue: N/A — no failing tests in Phase 2 Batch A.
